notes: C208 doorbell-sensor trigger routes to Class 2 caregiver confirmation, never to autonomous Class 1 unlock.
doorbell_detected=true is visitor-response context, not door unlock authorization.
Class 2 candidate set for C208 must NOT contain a lighting candidate as the first option (C1_LIGHTING_ASSISTANCE is excluded for caregiver_required_sensitive_path).
Caregiver confirmation belongs to a separately governed manual path; it is NOT autonomous Class 1 validator approval.
Class 2 notification payload must validate against class2_notification_payload_schema.json with exception_trigger_id=C208.

LLM-mode allowance (scenario_manifest_rules.md §7.5): the literal expected_first_candidate_id ('C2_CAREGIVER_HELP') is the static-fallback identifier. In llm_generated mode the LLM may emit any short id, but the adapter enforces caregiver-first ordering for unresolved_reason=caregiver_required_sensitive_path. Verifiers should match on expected_first_candidate_transition_target = CAREGIVER_CONFIRMATION (or its canonical alias SAFE_DEFERRAL_OR_CAREGIVER_CONFIRMATION) AND expected_first_candidate_action_hint is null.
